svg.title: Matrix heatmap of creativity-framework × AI-method cell statuses
svg.desc: 31 by 14 matrix showing cell statuses for creativity-framework sub-clusters against AI-method categories. X9 neurosymbolic column shows uniform Type 1 EMPTY status across all 31 rows. D4 multi-scale biological row shows Type 1 dense pattern. Cluster C conditions and Cluster D biological scope have zero IMPLEMENTED cells. Pattern documents the matrix's signature finding.
svg.text: Matrix heatmap: 31 creativity sub-clusters × 14 AI approaches
434 cells classified by implementation status under explicit thresholds
Highlighted column: X9 (neurosymbolic) is Type 1 EMPTY across all 31 sub-clusters under strict reading.
Held-out validation: pattern reproduces with one borderline KG-RAG exception (RUGGED) forcing threshold examination.
